"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10",

"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent softened or removed superlative claims and noted lack of awareness of prior work, but did not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations and suggested a related-work pass, showing some engagement but not comprehensive auditing.",
  "RX.1": "The agent explicitly marked confidence for each recommendation, fulfilling the highest standard.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the requested dimensions without scope drift.",
  "RX.4": "No regressions introduced, but no proactive identification of harmful patterns in the original.",
  "RX.5": "Some rewrites are traced, but not all non-cosmetic changes are annotated with sources and reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.7,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.75,
  "RX.5": 0.6
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent softened or removed superlative claims and noted lack of awareness of prior work, but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and suggested a related-work pass, showing some engagement but not comprehensive auditing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly marked confidence for each recommendation, fulfilling the highest standard.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the requested dimensions without scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions introduced, but no proactive identification of harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Some rewrites are traced, but not all non-cosmetic changes are annotated with sources and reasons.
